meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [3.1.0] - 2025-10-30

### Changed

- new attribute added: specVersion (Optional)

## [3.0.0] - 2024-05-21

### Changed

- connection update to @prefix ext-passport: <urn:samm:io.catenax.generic.digital_product_passport:5.0.0#>
- renamed and changed attribute and payload name from unspecific to generic on highest level
- changed example value for oilType
- changed names for torquePeak, torqueContinuous, powerPeak, powerContinuous, speed, maxPeriod
- changed PerformancePower to KilowattMeasurement (characteristic)

## [2.0.0] - 2024-03-04

### Added

- import of io.catenax.generic.digital_product_passport 4.0.0

### Changed

- redefined electrical performance attributes
- characteristics for the life time/warranty refined

## [1.0.0] - 2023-05-08

### Added

model created

### Changed

n/a

### Removed

n/a

nodes.label: TransmissionPass
nodes.description: The transmission passport corresponds to the digital product passport information required by the proposed Ecodesign Regulation (ESPR-2022) and describes the data that is collected and available during the lifespan of a transmission.

nodes.label: sustainability
nodes.description: Sustainability details about the transmission.

nodes.label: generalInformation
nodes.description: Property describing general information about the transmission.

nodes.label: stateOfHealth
nodes.description: State of health property describing several properties.

nodes.label: sparePartSupplier
nodes.description: Details of the  spare parts and suppliers of replacement parts / spare parts.

nodes.label: productSpecificParameters
nodes.description: Product specific parameters of the transmission.

nodes.label: instructions
nodes.description: Instructions concerning the transmission.

nodes.label: identification
nodes.description: Identification parameters of the transmission.

nodes.label: manufacturerId
nodes.description: The ID of the transmission manufacturer in form of the unique BPN(L) number.

nodes.label: warrantyPeriod
nodes.description: Commercial warranty period of the transmission (coupled to the Vehicle) in months.

nodes.label: additionalInformation
nodes.description: Open field for additional information such as a link.

nodes.label: dataMatrixCode
nodes.description: Data Matrix Code (DMC) link to the public of the transmission as specified in section 31 / page 26.

nodes.label: physicalDimensionsProperty
nodes.description: Describes the physical dimensions of the entity.

nodes.label: responsibleSourcingDocument
nodes.description: Document/Certificates on organizations compliance to ethical business practices.

nodes.label: carbonFootprint
nodes.description: Describes the carbon footprint of the substance or mixture. Based on the Ecodesign.

nodes.label: recyclateContent
nodes.description: List of recovered recyclate content. The following materials have to be reported on as a minimum: cobalt, lithium, nickel. Percentage of how much of the material was recycled. This can be an aggregation regarding the materials below. For example the amount of aluminium recovered from waste present in in each transmission model.

nodes.label: criticalRawMaterials
nodes.description: List of critical raw materials (CRM) as specified by EU in a transmission. For example Magnesium; Cobalt; Palladium.

nodes.label: substancesOfConcern
nodes.description: List of substances of concern. The name of the substances of concern present in the product. For example Lead; Cadmium; Dibortrioxide.

nodes.label: co2FootprintTotal
nodes.description: The total carbon footprint of the transmission, calculated as kg of carbon dioxide equivalent.

nodes.label: crossSectoralStandardsUsed
nodes.description: Discloses the cross-sectoral standards applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions as specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

nodes.label: productOrSectorSpecificRules
nodes.description: Product or sector specific rules applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions, e.g. PCRs (Product Category Rules), including operators or publishers and according rule names. Specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

nodes.label: productDescription
nodes.description: The detailed description about the product type.

nodes.label: productType
nodes.description: Type of transmission for passenger cars.

nodes.label: remanufacturing
nodes.description: Status of the transmission (first life or second life).

nodes.label: serviceHistory
nodes.description: The dates of putting the transmission into service (service history).

nodes.label: expectedLifespan
nodes.description: Expected transmission lifespan.

nodes.label: supplierContact
nodes.description: Contact information of the supplier

nodes.label: supplierId
nodes.description: BPNL of the supplier.

nodes.label: sparePartName
nodes.description: Name or Identification of the spare part.

nodes.label: driveType
nodes.description: The type of transmission drive (combustion engine, hybrid drive or purely electric drive).

nodes.label: torque
nodes.description: The maximum input torque in newton meters (the operating characteristics of the transmission).

nodes.label: power
nodes.description: The maximum power in kilowatt (the operating characteristics of the transmission).

nodes.label: torqueConverter
nodes.description: A list of the used transmission damper technology (depending on the transmission type). For example NW 200 TTD and NW 200 ZDW

nodes.label: speedResistance
nodes.description: The permissible maximum input speed in the respective gear (depending on the transmission type). For example 1 : max 7800min-1; 2 : max 7800min-1; 3 : max 7800min-1; 4 : max 7800min-1; 5 : max 7800min-1; 6 : max 7800min-1; 7 : max 6800min-1; 8 : max 5800min-1; R : max 2000min-1.

nodes.label: standardGearRatio
nodes.description: The ratio in the respective gear (ratio between transmission input speed and transmission output speed). For example 1 : 4.1567; 2 : 3.898; 3 : 2.887; 4 : 2.7783; 5 : 1.811; 6 : 1.6545; 7 : 0.4377; 8 : 0.6121; R : -2.2183.

nodes.label: spreading
nodes.description: The transmission spreading coefficient. The ratio between the smallest (shortest gear) and the largest (longest gear) ratio.

nodes.label: oilCapacity
nodes.description: The recomended oil volume in the transmission.

nodes.label: oilType
nodes.description: The suitable type of the oil for the transmission.

nodes.label: electricPerformance
nodes.description: The electric machine performance (the operating characteristics of the electric motor). Values are the kilowatt, volt and newtonmetre. An example could be 22 kW; 49 V and 150 Nm.

nodes.label: dismantlingProcedure
nodes.description: Document containing the transmission dismantling procedure.

nodes.label: vehicleDismantlingProcedure
nodes.description: Document containing the dismantling procedure from the vehicle.

nodes.label: packagingInstructions
nodes.description: Instructions for safely packaging of the transmission.

nodes.label: transportationInstructions
nodes.description: Instructions for safely transporting of the transmission.

nodes.label: safetyMeasures
nodes.description: Includes all safety relevant documents for e.g. Dismantling.

nodes.label: documentTitle
nodes.description: The header or title of the document

nodes.label: documentLink
nodes.description: A link referencing to the document.

nodes.label: otherSubstance
nodes.description: Details for the other optional substances.

nodes.label: cobalt
nodes.description: Percentage of the recyclate content of cobalt.

nodes.label: nickel
nodes.description: Percentage of the recyclate content of nickel.

nodes.label: lithium
nodes.description: Percentage of the recyclate content of lithium.

nodes.label: productStatusValue
nodes.description: Status of the transmission as first life or second life.

nodes.label: remanufacturingDate
nodes.description: Date of the (re-)manufacturing

nodes.label: substanceName
nodes.description: The name of the substance such as lead or aluminium.

nodes.label: substancePercentage
nodes.description: Substance percentage of the recycled content.

nodes.label: gear
nodes.description: Respective gear for the speed resistance.

nodes.label: speed
nodes.description: The permissible maximum input speed (rpm).

nodes.label: ratio
nodes.description: The ratio in the respective gear (ratio between transmission input speed and transmission output speed).

nodes.label: localIdentifiers
nodes.description: A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific data space, but is not unique in Catena-X data space. Multiple local identifiers may exist.

nodes.label: Sustainability
nodes.description: Sustainability Characteristic to describe sustainability factors.

nodes.label: GeneralInformation
nodes.description: Characteristic for general information.

nodes.label: StateOfHealth
nodes.description: State of health characteristic describing several properties.

nodes.label: ProductSpecificParameters
nodes.description: The Characteristic to describe product specific parameters of the transmission.

nodes.label: Instructions
nodes.description: Instructions characteristic concerning the transmission.

nodes.label: CarbonFootprint
nodes.description: Set of information needed for the carbon footprint ecodesign regulations.

nodes.label: RecyclateContent
nodes.description: Recyclate content in the transmission.

nodes.label: Remanufacturing
nodes.description: Status of the transmission (first life or second life) and remanufacturing history.

nodes.label: SpeedResistance
nodes.description: The speed resistance characteristic.

nodes.label: StandardGearRatio
nodes.description: The ratio in the respective gear.

nodes.label: Identification
nodes.description: Characteristic for the identification parameters of the transmission.

nodes.label: SparePartSupplier
nodes.description: Characteristic for details of the  spare parts and suppliers of replacement parts / spare parts.

nodes.label: DocumentsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Documents Characteristic with title and link.

nodes.label: StringList
nodes.description: A list with the data types string.

nodes.label: ServiceHistory
nodes.description: The dates of putting the transmission into service (service history) as list.

nodes.label: OtherSubstance
nodes.description: Characteristic for the other optional substances.

nodes.label: WarrantyPeriod
nodes.description: Commercial warranty period of the transmission (coupled to the Vehicle) in months as decimal.

nodes.label: ExpectedLifespan
nodes.description: Expected transmission lifespan in km.

nodes.label: TorqueNewtonMetre
nodes.description: Characteristic to describe the maximum input torque in newton meters.

nodes.label: PerformancePower
nodes.description: The performance power in kilowatt as decimal.

nodes.label: RevolutionsPerMinute
nodes.description: The permissible maximum input speed in revolutions per minute in the respective gear.

nodes.label: SustainabilityDetails
nodes.description: Sustainability details for the transmission.

nodes.label: GeneralInformationEntity
nodes.description: General Information Entity to describe several logical connected properties.

nodes.label: StateOfHealthEntity
nodes.description: State of health entity describing several logically connected properties.

nodes.label: SparePartEntity
nodes.description: Entity for details of the  spare parts and suppliers of replacement parts / spare parts.

nodes.label: ProductSpecificParametersEntity
nodes.description: The entity describing various product specific parameters of the transmission.

nodes.label: InstructionEntity
nodes.description: Instruction documents concerning the transmission.

nodes.label: CarbonFootprintEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the carbon footprint.

nodes.label: Documents
nodes.description: Entity describing a document.

nodes.label: RecyclateContentEntity
nodes.description: Recyclate content in the transmission with mandatory input values for cobalt, nickel and lithium.

nodes.label: RemanufacturingStatus
nodes.description: Status and Date of the (re-)manufacturing

nodes.label: SpeedResistanceEntity
nodes.description: The speed resitance entity. Includes the gear and the speed as separate properties.

nodes.label: GearRatio
nodes.description: Entity for the ratio in the respective gear. Includes the gear and the ratio as separate properties.

nodes.label: OtherSubstanceEntity
nodes.description: Percentage and substance name of the other substances.

nodes.label: IdentificationEntity
nodes.description: Identification parameters of the transmission with data matrix code, manufacturerID and serial number.

nodes.label: Co2Total
nodes.description: Characteristic for the total carbon footprint of the transmission, calculated as kg of carbon dioxide equivalent.

nodes.label: TransmissionSpreading
nodes.description: The transmission spreading coefficient. The ratio between the smallest (shortest gear) and the largest (longest gear) ratio as decimal with no unit.

nodes.label: Capacity
nodes.description: The oil capacity in dm³.

nodes.label: SubstancePercentage
nodes.description: Substance percentage of the recycled content.

nodes.label: Ratio
nodes.description: The ratio in the respective gear.

nodes.label: ProductDescription
nodes.description: The detailed description about the product type as enumeration.

nodes.label: DriveTypeEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration of the drive types with the values combustion engine, hybrid drive and electric drive.

nodes.label: ProductStatusEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration to describe the status of the transmission as first life or second life.

nodes.label: DocumentTitleTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the length to 60 characters.

nodes.label: GearTrait
nodes.description: Constraint to match a gear from 1 to 99 or R (reverse).

nodes.label: MaxTitleCharacters
nodes.description: Maximum title characters set to 60.

nodes.label: GearConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint to match a gear from 1 to 99 or R (reverse).
